issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with condition 'HasRestingDon:false' (requires resting this character as cost), not a bare Activated trigger. The 'Rest' action is a cost, not an effect.
Rest action should not be in actions array—it is a cost/requirement. Only FlipLife and KO should be in actions.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and TrashFromHand is completely unrelated to card text and should not exist. Card has no trash/play mechanic.
FlipLife should specify 'fromPosition' (top or bottom) and 'toLocation' (hand). Current usage lacks these required parameters.
